title: Explorepack
description: Embark on an immersive survival experience with explorepack. Featuring better mountains, new mob animations, dungeons, and an enhanced earlygame progression.
body: # Explorepack ### Note: Set your RAM to at least 4GB for smooth gameplay An exploration and realism-focused modpack designed to be immersive and fun. Including terrain and structure generation mods like Tectonic and Dungeons and Taverns. And progression mods like EarlyStage.
